message:
fr-conformance: add WAIT/WAITAOF validation errors to core_errors fixture (bd-2eb3)

Why:
- Generic conformance error fixture did not yet cover WAIT/WAITAOF arity and integer validation contracts.
- Adding these cases strengthens parity checks independent of packet-specific journey fixtures.

What changed:
- Updated `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_errors.json` with four new cases:
  - `WAIT 1` => wrong-arity error
  - `WAIT nope 0` => integer-range error
  - `WAITAOF 1 0` => wrong-arity error
  - `WAITAOF 1 nope 0` => integer-range error

Validation:
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture`
- `ubs crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_errors.json`

Traceability:
- Bead: bd-2eb3
- Mail thread: br-2eb3
